sections.title: Abstract
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Write a structured abstract following PRISMA 2020 format: Objective, Data Sources, Study Selection, Data Extraction, Results, Conclusions.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe the clinical question, rationale for the review, and specific objectives.

sections.title: Methods
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Detail search strategy (databases, terms, dates), eligibility criteria, screening process, data extraction, risk of bias assessment, and synthesis methods. Follow PRISMA 2020.

sections.title: Results
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Report PRISMA flow diagram numbers, study characteristics, risk of bias results, and synthesis findings (forest plots if meta-analysis).

sections.title: Discussion
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Summarize evidence, discuss quality and heterogeneity, compare with previous reviews, address limitations, and state implications.

sections.title: PRISMA 2020 Checklist
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Generate PRISMA 2020 checklist mapping each item to the manuscript location.

sections.title: References
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Compile cited literature using Vancouver numbered citation style.
